LAW AND MOTION, 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATED IT TENTIVE RULING AND TOOK OFF CALENDAR PETITIONER LIEFF, CABRASER, HEIMANN & BERNSTEIN, LLP'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IN LIGHT OF THE CASE BEING REMOVED TO FEDERAL COURT. A COPY OF RESPONDENT'S PLEADING TO THAT AFFECT WAS SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court VACATED IT TENTIVE RULING AND TOOK OFF CALENDAR PETITIONER LIEFF, CABRASER, HEIMANN & BERNSTEIN, LLP'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration IN LIGHT OF THE CASE BEING REMOVED TO FEDERAL COURT.
